holderBonus.registeredUserLimit: one holder bonus per registered user
holderBonus.walletLimit: one verified Base wallet per registered user
holderBonus.activationRequirement: controlled HTTPS account UI, read-only GCA balance verification, and credit ledger activation

gcaMember.registeredUserLimit: one member status review per registered user
gcaMember.walletLimit: one verified Base wallet per registered user
gcaMember.activationRequirement: controlled HTTPS account UI, read-only GCA balance verification, member ledger activation, and support review queue
gcaMember.plannedAccessScope: higher utility credit limits, member research notes, priority report queue, member training sessions, and priority support

serviceCatalog.name: Liquidation Replay
serviceCatalog.description: Structured post-trade review of liquidation, over-sizing, leverage, stop placement, and execution mistakes.
serviceCatalog.notPurpose: Not compensation, reimbursement, insurance, or a promise that future losses can be avoided.

serviceCatalog.name: Risk Warning Review
serviceCatalog.description: Risk warning review for volatility, crowding, exposure, stop placement, and trade-process discipline.
serviceCatalog.notPurpose: Not financial advice, live market data, or a buy or sell recommendation.

serviceCatalog.name: Backtest Lab
serviceCatalog.description: Backtest review with fees, slippage, drawdown, sample quality, and risk-constraint notes.
serviceCatalog.notPurpose: Not proof that a strategy will perform in live markets.

serviceCatalog.name: ENTRY_READY Review
serviceCatalog.description: Setup, invalidation, risk budget, execution-condition, and readiness review for a trade idea.
serviceCatalog.notPurpose: Not automatic live order execution or a bypass of risk controls.

serviceCatalog.name: Position Size Calculator
serviceCatalog.description: Risk budget, stop-distance, leverage-bound, exposure-limit, and maximum-loss calculation workflow.
serviceCatalog.notPurpose: Not leverage encouragement or a replacement for user judgment.

serviceCatalog.name: Risk-Control Training
serviceCatalog.description: Training content for liquidation prevention, trade journaling, execution discipline, and risk-first workflow.
serviceCatalog.notPurpose: Not a certification, license, or promise of trading results.

serviceCatalog.name: Member Research Notes
serviceCatalog.description: Member-only China Narrative Radar notes, weekly research extensions, and risk-context summaries.
serviceCatalog.notPurpose: Not private investment advice, price forecasts, or listing information.

serviceCatalog.name: Support Review Queue
serviceCatalog.description: Priority support routing for account, verification, report, and member-workflow review after account UI is live.
serviceCatalog.notPurpose: Not an emergency trading desk, exchange support channel, or transaction recovery service.

safeClaims: GCA has published a draft service catalog for planned Web3 Radar utility credits.
The 10,000 GCA holder bonus is planned as one account-level 100 Web3 Radar utility credits record after controlled verification is live.
The 1,000,000 GCA Member threshold is planned as an account-level member review after controlled verification is live.
Credits and member status are not self-service claimable until controlled HTTPS account UI and ledger activation are live.
The official public market route is the Base Mainnet Uniswap v4 GCA/USDT pool.
doNotClaim: 100 Web3 Radar utility credits are live self-service claimable before controlled HTTPS account UI is released
GCA Member status is live self-service claimable before controlled wallet verification and ledger activation
credits or member status are cash, tokens, income, reimbursement, trading permission, or transferable value
token ownership bypasses risk controls, support review, or simulation-first requirements
service units are final commercial pricing before public terms are published
